tasks.label: Git: Commit EAS production build configuration
args:
feat: Remove debug signing from release build, configure Expo EAS for Play Store AAB production builds

- Updated gradle release buildType to use EAS-managed signing
- Configured eas.json production profile with app-bundle output
- Updated app.json with Android release configurations
- Added comprehensive Play Store release guide

tasks.label: Commit authentication flow fixes
args:
fix: Complete authentication flow fixes for Supabase

- Fixed email signup: State updates immediately, loading spinner stops, navigation works
- Fixed email login: Proper error handling, loading stops on all paths, navigation works
- Fixed Google OAuth: Loading state managed correctly, deep link handling complete
- Added error messages for all auth failures (wrong password, network errors, etc)
- Ensured loading state ALWAYS stops (try/catch/finally protection)
- Session persistence via AsyncStorage working correctly
- Onboarding properly reset for new OAuth users
- Added comprehensive logging for debugging

All auth flows now complete successfully in standalone Android APK.

Related issues:
- Google Sign-In loading spinner never stopped → FIXED
- Email signup loading spinner indefinite → FIXED  
- Email login loading spinner indefinite → FIXED
- No error messages on auth failures → FIXED
- Deep link token exchange failures → FIXED
